zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter De Clifford於1113年出生時，他的父親Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan38歲，母親Maud de Pitres28歲。他於1135年與Margaret de Tosny在英國賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年5月23日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter De Clifford于1113年出生时，他的父亲Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan38岁，母亲Maud de Pitres28岁。他于1135年与Margaret de Tosny在英国賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年5月23日在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter De Clifford was born in 1113, his father, Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan, was 38 and his mother, Maud de Pitres, was 28. He married Margaret de Tosny in 1135, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 May 1190, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter De Clifford est né en 1113, son père, Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud de Pitres, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Tosny en 1135, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1190, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter De Clifford 1113 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan 38 und seine Mutter Maud de Pitres 28. Er hat 1135 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England Margaret de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1190 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Clifford è nato il nel 1113, il suo padre, Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Pitres, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Tosny nel 1135, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1190, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter De Cliffordが1113年に生まれた時，父Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychanは38歳，母Maud de Pitresは28歳であった。1135年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドでMargaret de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年5月23日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter De Clifford(이)가 1113년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Pitres(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1135년 영국 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 Margaret de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Clifford nasceu em 1113, seu pai, Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Pitres, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Tosny em 1135, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1190, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter De Clifford родился в 1113 г., его отцу по имени Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Pitres, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Tosny в 1135 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1190 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter De Clifford nació en 1113, su papá, Richard FitzPons Lord of Cantref Bychan, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Maud de Pitres, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret de Tosny en 1135, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1190, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
